title: Orlando Heat Wave
lead: Orlando is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +4.03. This critical event has a score of 10.0/10, posing significant risks to the city.
body:
The current heat wave in Orlando is characterized by extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Day (CDD) value of 13.1 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 54%, and the wind speed is approximately 11.4 km/h, which may provide minimal relief. 
 The city's infrastructure and residents are under strain due to the prolonged heat wave, with no heating degree days (HDD) recorded.
conclusion: Monitor the situation closely and take necessary precautions to mitigate the effects of the heat wave.
